subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Good to hear from you — I remember our conversation at the conference and would be glad to explore how we might work together.

I'm available for a 30-minute call next week at any of these times:

- Tuesday, April 7 at 1:00 PM UTC
- Thursday, April 9 at 3:00 PM UTC
- Friday, April 10 at 10:00 AM UTC

Let me know what suits you and I'll send a calendar invite with a meeting link.

As for the request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I can't share internal contact information directly. Let's start with our call first, and if a senior-level technical discussion makes sense, I'll be happy to facilitate the right introductions on our end.

Thanks, and looking forward to catching up!

Best regards
